fix: Viewer hook-health panel over the Runtime Record invocation ledger (.excn/runtime/hook-invocations_progress.json): per-feature doctor-parity cards (firing/stale/disabled + last heartbeat) + collapsible recent-invocations table filterable by feature/outcome; absent/empty ledger renders an explicit empty state; status ledger-derived (mirrors health-policy.js). Bundled the EXEC-067 viewer load-path fix (load_progress.json -> .excn/runtime/). Commit 3bf5bbe. code-standards PASS; verified on the live viewer server.
title: Viewer hook health: doctor-parity cards plus the invocation log
description: The viewer renders per-feature hook health cards mirroring doctor (firing / stale / disabled, last heartbeat) from the Runtime Record invocation ledger, with a collapsible recent-invocations table filterable by feature and outcome. End-to-end: a stale or broken hook is visible on the status page at a glance, with the log entries to diagnose it.
acceptance_criteria: Per-feature cards show doctor-parity status and last heartbeat from .excn/runtime/hook-invocations_progress.json
Collapsible table shows recent invocations, filterable by feature and outcome
Missing or empty ledger renders an explicit empty state, not an error
Src-First: template viewer first, dogfood root mirrors; code-standards gate PASSes; verified on the live viewer server
